code:
%%{FinTech_LedgerService}}}%%
stateDiagram-v2
    [FinTech_PaymentGateway] --> Forming: TeamCreatedEvent
    Forming --> Active: TeamActivatedEvent
    Active --> Archived: TeamArchivedEvent
    Archived --> Active: TeamRestoredEvent
    Active --> Deleted: TeamDeletedEvent
    Archived --> Deleted: TeamDeletedEvent
    
    %% State styling with classes
    classDef formingState fill:#F39C12,stroke:#ecf0f1,color:black
    classDef activeState fill:#27AE60,stroke:#ecf0f1,color:black
    classDef archivedState fill:#7F8C8D,stroke:#ecf0f1,color:white
    classDef deletedState fill:#C0392B,stroke:#ecf0f1,color:white
    
    class Forming formingState
    class Active activeState
    class Archived archivedState
    class Deleted deletedState
    
    %% Notes
    note right of Forming
        Team is being set up
        Members can be added but team is not fully operational
    end note
    
    note right of Active
        Team is active and can be used by members
        Members can create content and collaborate
    end note
    
    note right of Archived
        Team is archived and read-only
        No new content can be created
        Can be restored at any time
    end note
    
    note right of Deleted
        Team has been permanently deleted
        Cannot be recovered
        All associated data is soft-deleted
    end note

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为FinTech_PaymentGateway设计一个团队生命周期状态图，核心状态包括Forming、Active、Archived和Deleted四个阶段。
明白了。我注意到Forming是初始状态，那团队创建时是从FinTech_PaymentGateway直接进入Forming吗？还有Deleted状态是否可逆？
是的，通过TeamCreatedEvent进入Forming。Deleted是终态，不可恢复——所有关联数据都会被软删除。但Archived可以恢复到Active。
好的，我已经画出了状态流转：Forming经TeamActivatedEvent到Active，Active可以走TeamArchivedEvent到Archived，也可以走TeamDeletedEvent到Deleted。Archived同样能走TeamDeletedEvent到Deleted。
每个状态需要加注释说明。Forming阶段成员可以加入但团队未完全运营；Active时成员可创建内容协作；Archived只读，可恢复；Deleted永久删除。
关于样式，我建议用颜色区分状态：Forming用橙色，Active绿色，Archived灰色，Deleted红色。这样视觉上更直观，您看可以吗？
可以，颜色方案合理。注意文字颜色搭配：Forming和Active用黑字，Archived和Deleted用白字，确保可读性。
已完成。四个状态都应用了对应的class样式，注释也分别添加在右侧。整个状态图现在清晰展示了团队从创建到删除的完整生命周期。
